movie.title: Liar Game : Season 1 Dual/Multi Audio [Hindi ORG, Jap & ENG] WEB-DL 720p HEVC | [Epi 1-12 Added]
movie.synopsis: After Nao Kanzaki receives a strange letter and a suitcase containing 100 million yen, she learns that she has been selected to participate in the LIAR GAME. Nao turns to a former con artist to survive the twisted game.
